_note: SYNTHETIC sample signals for demonstration ONLY. These are NOT real events. They exist to show how the corroboration/confidence ladder behaves.

signals.title: Gunmen abduct travellers along Kaduna-Abuja highway
signals.text: [SAMPLE] Armed men reportedly kidnapped several travellers near Kaduna along the Kaduna-Abuja road on Friday evening, residents said.

signals.title: Several feared kidnapped in Kaduna highway attack
signals.text: [SAMPLE] Bandits attacked vehicles around Kaduna and abducted an unknown number of passengers; one person was feared killed.

signals.title: Dem kidnap people for Kaduna road
signals.text: [SAMPLE] Gunmen don kidnap travellers for Kaduna expressway, people dey find dem family.

signals.title: Bandits raid Gusau community in Zamfara
signals.text: [SAMPLE] Armed bandits raided a community near Gusau in Zamfara, rustling cattle and abducting two residents.

signals.title: Parents report missing students in Kankara
signals.text: [SAMPLE] Families in Kankara said some students went missing after gunmen were seen near a school.

signals.title: Gunmen abduct residents in Shiroro, Niger State
signals.text: [SAMPLE] Gunmen abducted and kidnapped several residents in Shiroro, Niger State during an overnight raid.

signals.title: Shiroro residents abducted in fresh kidnapping
signals.text: [SAMPLE] A fresh kidnapping in Shiroro left several residents abducted; families are searching for them.

signals.title: Travellers kidnapped near Lokoja
signals.text: [SAMPLE] Gunmen kidnapped travellers along a road near Lokoja, Kogi State; police are investigating.

signals.title: Kidnap of commuters reported in Lokoja
signals.text: [SAMPLE] Residents reported the kidnap of commuters near Lokoja; the abducted persons have not been found.
